name: e2e-runner-hang-signal-fixes
description: Fix E2E experiment runner hanging and ignoring Ctrl+C/Ctrl+Z by replacing blocking as_completed/future.result loops with wait(timeout) polling, adding shutdown checks to subprocess.communicate and rate-limit sleep loops, and fixing SIGTSTP handler conflicts. Use when: (1) manage_experiment.py hangs after tier initialization messages, (2) Ctrl+C has no effect during parallel tier/subtest execution, (3) Ctrl+Z does graceful shutdown instead of force-killing the process group.
